Replaced incorrectly classified <FORMAT>9. 1.</FORMAT> with <REF>9. 1.</REF> to properly denote a scripture reference rather than a book format. Resolved 12 mojibake/encoding artifacts (e.g., \u221a\u00bc to ü, \u221a\u2020 to †, \u221a\u00a7 to ä) and fixed minor OCR/typographical errors (Ccena→Coena, Carechetischer→Catechetischer, Btatt→Blatt, Gebatt→Gebet) to restore historical German orthography and ensure XML well-formedness.
